column2: ## source descriptive syntax and analyses draft
`summarise()` has grouped output by 'grade'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.
Joining with `by = join_by(outcome, lhs, op, rhs, grade)`
Joining with `by = join_by(outcome, lhs, op, rhs, grade, label, est, se, pvalue, ci.lower, ci.upper, std.all, significant)`
